calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirm Decedent'S Assets Held By Trust
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martha Daetwyler for Barbara Selby.

The Court stated that all Parties had been given notice. Ms. Daetwyler stated that she had four consents, that she now has the 5th one, and that she would file it and return an endorsed copy to the Court. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Confirm Decedent'S Assets Held By Trust
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Continued To Oct-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
